name: Short Course - Earnings Return Scenarios
description: POSTs one learner per FLP-1673 scenario. Dates: 25/26 = 2025-08-01 to 2026-07-31, 24/25 = 2024-08-01 to 2025-07-31. Actual end dates use completionDate. Verify SLD return manually.

steps.name: Scenario 1: Start 25/26, Planned 25/26, No end date → Return YES
Scenario 2: Start 25/26, Planned 25/26, Completed 25/26 → Return YES
Scenario 3: Start 24/25, Planned 24/25, No end date → Return YES
Scenario 4: Start 24/25, Planned 24/25, Completed 24/25 → Return NO
Scenario 5: Start 24/25, Planned 25/26, Completed 24/25 → Return NO
Scenario 6: Start 24/25, Planned 24/25, Completed 25/26 → Return YES
Scenario 7: Start 24/25, Planned 25/26, Completed 25/26 → Return YES
Scenario 8: Start 24/25, Planned 25/26, No end date → Return YES
